You will primarily be responsible for:


* Supporting the team in updating, verifying and monitoring the internal consistency of the Rules of Borsa Italiana, MTS, Cassa di Compensazione e Garanzia and Monte Titoli
* Assessing compliance of these Rules with internal and external provisions
* Monitoring new domestic and international regulatory initiatives and conducting thematic analysis
* Performing comparative analysis of national regulations and evaluating implications on the national regulatory framework

Your profile:


* Master’s degree in Law (or currently enrolled in a relevant programme)
* Good knowledge of English, both written and spoken
* Sound knowledge of Microsoft Office suite
* Teamworking skills, precision and attention to detail
* Strong analytical and organisational abilities
* Interest in capital markets and financial regulation

Join a company where market infrastructure is built on innovation — and where every innovation starts with a bold mind asking, “What’s next?”. At Euronext, we believe change is a starting point, not an obstacle. We look for people who see growth opportunities, think long term, and want to help shape capital markets for future generations. Working with us means:


* Being part of a European, international and diverse team – Collaborate across borders with talented colleagues connected by a shared ambition and purpose.

Apply by submitting a CV in English

The team works closely with legal, compliance and business units to maintain a robust regulatory framework and to respond proactively to new regulatory developments.


Join Euronext – Shape capital markets for future generations Euronext is the leading European capital market covering the entire capital markets value chain, from listing, trading, clearing, settlement and custody, to solutions for issuers and investors. We operate seven national stock exchanges, handling 25% of European lit equity trading. Our products include equities, FX, ETFs, bonds, derivatives, commodities and indices. Euronext also provides clearing and settlement services through Euronext Clearing and our network of Euronext Securities CSDs. In addition, Euronext runs MTS, one of Europe’s leading electronic fixed income trading markets, and Nord Pool, the European power market. title: Lead Piping Engineer
description:
Siamo **SICIM**, un’azienda familiare con Headquarter a **Parma** e Hub di Engineering e Procurement a **Milano**. Sicim da oltre 60 anni realizza progetti nel settore dell’energia su larga scala. Grazie ad una solida presenza internazionale, operiamo in più di 20 paesi distribuiti su quattro continenti e contiamo più di 10\.000 collaboratori. Specializzati nei servizi EPC (Engineering, Procurement, Construction), la nostra missione è supportare i clienti nella progettazione e costruzione di infrastrutture e impianti sostenibili, contribuendo attivamente alla transizione energetica.

  

  

**Posizione:**
--------------

Il/La Lead Piping Engineer è responsabile del coordinamento e dell’integrità tecnica di tutte le attività di ingegneria della propria disciplina, dalla fase di offerta fino alla progettazione di dettaglio e al completamento del progetto.


Garantisce che i deliverable di disciplina siano sviluppati in conformità ai requisiti contrattuali, alle specifiche di progetto, agli standard di qualità e alle tempistiche previste.


La persona selezionata si occuperà di coordinare la progettazione e lo sviluppo dei sistemi di piping, dei layout e dei disegni isometrici. Supervisionare la selezione dei materiali, l’integrità del modello 3D e la risoluzione delle interferenze. Gestire le attività di analisi delle sollecitazioni (stress analysis) e la progettazione dei supporti, garantendo un funzionamento sicuro e conforme alle normative. Collaborare strettamente con le discipline di processo, meccanica e civile per assicurare una progettazione d’impianto integrata, realizzabile e in linea con i requisiti di progetto e le normative applicabili.


Inoltre, è responsabile di:

* Analizzare e interpretare i requisiti contrattuali e tecnici, sia in fase di offerta che in fase esecutiva.
* Definire e mantenere la lista dei documenti di disciplina (disegni, datasheet, specifiche, calcoli, ecc.).
* Supportare il Dipartimento Commerciale nella stima delle ore di ingegneria in fase di gara.
* Preparare i contributi tecnici di disciplina per la documentazione d’offerta.
* Pianificare e monitorare le attività di ingegneria della disciplina, garantendo il rispetto delle tempistiche di progetto.
* Contribuire alla selezione e qualifica delle società di ingegneria esterne e gestirle durante le attività di progettazione esternalizzata.
* Staffare i progetti assegnando le risorse tecniche adeguate e fornendo loro guida e supervisione nello sviluppo dell’ingegneria di dettaglio.
* Preparare la documentazione tecnica per le richieste d’offerta ai fornitori (Material Requisition, RFQ, datasheet, specifiche).
* Partecipare alla valutazione tecnica e all’allineamento delle offerte dei fornitori.
* Seguire lo sviluppo dell’ingegneria di dettaglio dei fornitori (vendor follow\-up), revisionando i documenti e assicurandone la corretta integrazione con il progetto.
* Coordinarsi con le altre discipline per gestire le interfacce e risolvere le problematiche tecniche.
* Fornire supporto tecnico ai team di costruzione e di commissioning.
* Assicurare la preparazione e l’emissione della documentazione As Built.
* Mantenere gli standard, i template e le buone pratiche della disciplina, promuovendo il miglioramento continuo.
Contribuire alla raccolta delle lessons learned e alla capitalizzazione delle conoscenze tecniche tra i progetti.  
* 

  

**Requisiti:**
--------------

* Conoscenza delle dinamiche EPC maturata in contesti internazionali e con clienti top del mercato Oil and Gas
* Padronanza di software di modellazione 3D
* Conoscenza dei material e delle normative di settore
* Formazione: Laurea in Ingegneria Meccanica
* Esperienza Richiesta: circa 10 anni in aziende del mercato oil and gas operanti in ambito EPC
* Disponibilità a trasferte worldwide
* Competenze e soft skill richieste: capacità di assumere decisioni in modo consapevole e responsabile, dimostrando abilità nell’analisi del contesto decisionale e nella gestione efficace di situazioni impreviste.

**Altre informazioni:**
-----------------------

**Cosa ti offriamo**

* CCNL: Contratto Collettivo Nazionale di Lavoro per il settore Edilizia e Affini, con applicazione del Contratto Integrativo Provinciale vigente
* Contratto: Tempo indeterminato
* Periodo di prova: come da inquadramento contrattuale
* Retribuzione: range retributivo tra €65\.000 e €80\.000
* Modello di lavoro ibrido: un giorno di smartworking a settimana
* Sede di lavoro: Milano

**Per conoscere meglio la nostra organizzazione e i benefit offerti, ti invitiamo a consultare il sito internet** **Più Valore per Te: SICIM FOR YOU \| SICIM**


In linea con il nostro impegno verso un sistema retributivo equo e trasparente:

* Il livello retributivo indicato rappresenta il livello previsto per il ruolo all’interno del nostro framework salariale
* Eventuali scostamenti saranno: limitati e motivati sulla base di criteri oggettivi e verificabilicoerenti con evidenze emerse nel processo di selezione


Tali criteri includono, a titolo esemplificativo:

* esperienza significativamente superiore/inferiore rispetto al target di ruolo
* competenze specialistiche distintive e rilevanti
* configurazione finale della posizione (scope, responsabilità, contesto operativo)
* risultato di assessment tecnici e/o valutazioni strutturate
* allineamento con equità interna e ruoli comparabili


Non verranno in alcun caso considerati:

* precedenti livelli retributivi del/della candidato/a
* fattori soggettivi o discriminatori (genere, età, origine, ecc.)

**Regulatory Compliance**


Le decisioni retributive sono assunte:

* nel rispetto del principio di parità di retribuzione per lo stesso lavoro o lavoro di pari valore
* in conformità alla Direttiva (UE) 2023/970 e al Decreto Legislativo 96/2026
* in coerenza con il CCNL di riferimento
* secondo i principi definiti nel nostro Codice Etico e nelle politiche DE\&I aziendali

*All CVs must be submitted with authorization for the processing of personal data in accordance with EU Regulation No. 2016/679 \- GDPR. The job offer is intended to be addressed to both genders in accordance with the provisions of Laws 903/77 and 125/91\.*

title: Junior Process Management Engineer INTERNSHIP
description:
TXT Group is an international, IT end\-to\-end provider of consultancy, software solutions and services, supporting the digital transformation of customers’ products and core processes. With a proprietary software portfolio and deep expertise in vertical domains, TXT Group operates across different markets, with a growing footprint in Aerospace, Aviation, Defense, Industrial, Government and Fintech. The holding company, TXT e\-Solutions, has been listed on the Italian Stock Exchange \- STAR segment (TXT.MI) \- since July 2000\. TXT Group headquartered in Milan and has subsidiaries in Italy, Germany, the United Kingdom, France, Switzerland and the United States of America.
  
  

**Junior Process Management Engineer INTERNSHIP:**  

TXT e\-Tech, part of the TXT Group, develops advanced technological solutions for the Aerospace, Defence, and High\-Tech sectors. For the Embedded Systems for Aerospace Applications Business Unit, we are looking for a person interested in starting a growth path as a Process Management Engineer, contributing to the definition and monitoring of software and hardware certification processes.
  
  

Main Activities
  
  

The selected person will be supported by experienced colleagues and will assist the team in the following activities:
  
  

supporting the definition and improvement of development processes;
  
monitoring compliance with company and regulatory processes;
  
managing and organizing technical and certification documentation;
  
supporting requirements management activities;
  
collaborating with software and hardware development teams;
  
participating in quality assurance and compliance activities.
  
Education
  
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Aerospace Engineering, Aeronautical Engineering, Electronic Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Mechatronics Engineering, or related fields.
  
Technical Skills
  
Basic knowledge of aeronautical systems principles.
  
Academic knowledge of at least one programming language (C, C\+\+, C\#, Java, JavaScript, Python, Ada, or equivalent).
  
Basic knowledge of electronics.
  
Ability to understand requirements and technical documentation.
  
Nice to Have
  
Familiarity with requirements management gained through academic or personal projects.
  
Introductory knowledge of DO\-178C, DO\-254 standards, or Functional Safety principles.
  
Interest in certification processes in the aerospace field.
  
Soft Skills
  
Interest in complex systems and technologically advanced environments.
  
Analytical and structured approach to problem solving.
  
Teamworking attitude.
  
Curiosity, proactivity, and a continuous learning mindset.
  
Accuracy in documentation management.
  
Good written and spoken English, at least B2 level.
  
What We Offer
  
**Flexible working environment:** we offer flexible working hours and support smart working policies.
  
**International environment:** we are a global company with offices around the world, including Milan, Berlin, Seattle, Dallas, and Paris, fostering collaboration and support across projects and colleagues, and creating a diverse environment that encourages continuous exchange of cultures and perspectives.
  
**Teamwork:** collaboration to achieve shared goals, combined with engaging team\-building activities and company events.
  
The proposed contract type for this position is a 6\-month extracurricular internship, with a gross monthly internship allowance of €1,000\.
  
  

This position is open to all applicants regardless of gender, in accordance with Legislative Decree 198/2006\. The company promotes equal opportunities and values diversity in all its forms.

title: Data Center Facility Engineer Italy
description:
The Facility Operations Engineer is a key role in the technical management of critical systems within a Data Center. The primary responsibility is to ensure the proper operation, operational continuity, and technical efficiency of electrical, mechanical, and safety systems through advanced monitoring, structured technical analysis, and technical coordination of suppliers.



This role does not involve design activities; instead, it is responsible for the engineering supervision of operations, analysis of infrastructure performance, technical assessment of anomalies, fault diagnosis, and management of maintenance activities in highly critical environments.

 **MAIN TECHNICAL RESPONSIBILITIES**


**Engineering Supervision and Technical Control**


* Continuous technical monitoring of critical systems: electrical (MV/LV, UPS, generator sets), mechanical (HVAC), fire protection, and security systems.
* Performance analysis through BMS/SCADA systems and early detection of anomalies or inefficiencies.
* Technical validation of routine, extraordinary, and corrective maintenance activities.

  


**Technical Incident Management**


* Technical coordination during infrastructure incidents and fault analysis.
* Preparation and validation of Root Cause Analyses (RCA), identifying underlying technical causes.
* Development and monitoring of corrective action plans for risk mitigation.

  


**Energy Monitoring and Data Analysis**


* Technical analysis of energy consumption and efficiency parameters (PUE, power demand, load profiles).
* Production of monthly technical reports and collaboration with Energy Management teams.
* Technical support during energy and environmental audits.

  


**Technical Coordination of Suppliers**

  

* Engineering supervision of activities carried out by external suppliers (FM providers, maintenance contractors, specialized technicians).
* Validation of operational procedures, technical dry runs, checklists, and MOPs/SOPs.
* Verification of compliance with technical, regulatory, and HSE standards.

  


**Support to Internal Functions**


* Collaboration with Critical Environment Managers, Service Delivery, and Compliance teams.
* Participation in technical committees, infrastructure reviews, failure simulations, and management of minor projects.
* Technical support during customer audits, certification processes, and inspection visits.

  


**REQUIREMENTS**


**Education**


* Degree in Electrical, Energy, Mechanical Engineering, or related fields.
* Experience in complex industrial or high\-availability environments (preferably Data Centers, Hospitals, or Critical Infrastructure).

  


**Technical Skills**


* Advanced knowledge of electrical systems (MV/LV), UPS, generators, HVAC, fire detection, and security systems.
* Proficiency in reading electrical diagrams, system logic diagrams, and functional schematics.
* Experience in technical fault analysis and advanced troubleshooting.
* Familiarity with regulations and standards (CEI 0\-16, CEI 64\-8, ISO 50001, ISO 27001, ISO 14001\).
* Knowledge of BMS/SCADA systems, technical data analysis, and diagnostic tools.
* Technical English, written and spoken.

  


**SOFT SKILLS**


* Strong analytical mindset and a structured approach to problem solving.
* Decision\-making ability in complex and high\-pressure situations.
* Team\-oriented attitude and ability to collaborate across disciplines.
* Strong sense of responsibility and technical ownership.
* Ability to communicate effectively with technical teams, suppliers, and customers.
* Precision, methodical approach, and a continuous improvement mindset.
* Availability for on\-call duty and on\-site presence when required.
